title: Robust Spicy Basque French Kale Madeleine
description: A spicy and fluffy Basque French dish featuring kale and pickle, perfect for a hangover cure. This Buddhist-temple-friendly madeleine is a unique and delicious treat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the olive oil, non dairy milk, and apple cider vinegar.
Add the chopped kale and pickle to the wet ingredients and stir to combine.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Pour the batter into a madeleine pan and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the madeleines from the oven and let them cool in the pan for 5 minutes.
Transfer the madeleines to a wire rack to cool completely.
